series_metadata.series_description: The official PUCO/Ohio Railroad Commission Annual Reports from 1867 to the present. Reports contain summaries of all transactions and proceedings for each fiscal year, as well as official acts of the Commission, policies, functions, operations, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: no longer of administrative value ; Paper: 1 copy permanently. 1 copy State Archives. excess copies when no longer of administrative value
